title: Cyber Security (English) Master's Program Mission and Vision
content:
Cyber Security (English) Master's Program Mission and Vision

Mission

Cybersecurity Program provides a strong interdisciplinary foundation and detailed technical knowledge in cybersecurity and privacy.

The program identifies and addresses huge challenges faced by the society in cybersecurity and privacy issues, engages with the stakeholders and shares information with the public.

Vision

The vision of Uskudar University Cybersecurity Master's Program is to convey the education and experience that will address contemporary and future cybersecurity challenges faced by organizations and individuals by applying mental processes including cognitive science, psychology, philosophy, neuroscience and artificial intelligence to thinking, reasoning, learning and behavior in the field of cybersecurity.
